title: ⛏️ Create Ore Excavation x Mekanism
description: The perfect datapack/Mod for anyone wanting to combine Create Ore Excavation with Mekanism
body:
The perfect datapack for anyone wanting to combine Create Ore Excavation with Mekanism in Minecraft 1.21.x

# ✨ Features
5 Ready-to-Use Ore Veins & Drilling Recipes: Integrates raw Osmium, Lead, Tin, Uranium, and Fluorite.

NEW! Tiered Fluid Drilling System: Reward your factory building! Pump Mekanism fluids into your drills for massive bonuses:

-   Tier 1 (Brine): Grants a 50% chance for bonus ores. Requires a Diamond or Netherite Drill.

-   Tier 2 (Sulfuric Acid): 100% guaranteed double ores AND 2x drilling speed! Requires the Netherite Drill

1.21.x Ready
Veins are either infinite or finite depending on COE Settings.

# ⚙️ Customization (For Server Admins) 
By default, the ores are set to be quite common so they are easy to find. You can easily adjust the rarity to balance your server:

Open the datapack and navigate to data/createoreexcavation/ore_vein_type/.

Open the desired ore file.

Under the "placement" section, change the values for "spacing" (grid size in chunks) and "separation" (minimum distance in chunks). > Note: The separation value must always be strictly smaller than the spacing value!



# 📥 Installation

## For the datapack:
Download the .zip file.

For an existing world: Move the .zip into your world's datapacks/ folder and run the /reload command in-game.

For a new world: Add the .zip directly via the "Data Packs" tab during the world creation menu.

## For the mod(jar file):
You can just install it like any other mod.


### Dependencies:
Create, Create Ore Excavation and Mekanism
